name: Crown Energy AB (publ)
summary: Crown Energy AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, operates as an international oil, gas, and property industries with operations focused on underexplored areas in Africa and the Middle East. It operates through two segments, Asset Development and Management Business Area, and Energy Business Area. The Asset Development and Management Business Area segment provides customized residential and office solutions, and associated services to energy companies. Its services include design and construction, leasing, and property management, as well as other value-added services, such as security, transport, and telecommunications. The Energy Business Area segment develops and explores oil assets in early stages for recoverable reserves. Crown Energy AB (publ) was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden. Crown Energy AB (publ) is a subsidiary of YBE Ventures Ltd.
